case_title: TIAN JO TANG ET AL VS. LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TANG, TIAN JO CHEN, LIANG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP LAU, SOPHIE $1,647.66 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,647.66, DEFENDANT IS TO RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,647.66, AN AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP LAU, SOPHIE RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT TANG, TIAN JO CHEN, LIANG $2,017.66 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,017.66, ($1647.66 + $1320.00 PAINTING MINUS $950.00 FOR FLOOR = TOTAL PRINCIPAL AMOUNT) DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-06-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, August 6, 2015 in Department 525:
No Appearance by Respondents/Plaintiffs Tian Jo Tang and Liang Chen. Court appointed Cantonese interpreter, Rebecca Chau who is present for Respondent/plaintiff.
Sophie Lau - owner, Appellant/Defendant appears as Propria Persona and also for LAUS INVERSTMENT GROUP.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Sophie Lau is sworn.

Defendant/Appellant, Sophie Lau testifies on her own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1 - lease agreement and list of itemized invoices
Exhibit 2 - 6 pictures of floor
Exhibit 3 - various pictures of damaged wall
Exhibit 4 - pictures of damaged bathroom and kitchen
Exhibit 5 - pictures of damaged garage

After the testimony of Ms. Lau and evidence presented, the Court takes this matter under submission. New evidence retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-21-2015 Judgment Entered
